text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Good work today! That will be all for the
introductory course.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If something is unclear or you have any
concerns, please click the "i" button to
view various tips, or access the Help
menu!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
From here on, you'll be working hand in
hand with the Umamusume through
training and everyday life here at the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Take on the Twinkle Series and make your
trainees' dreams come true!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm very much looking forward to what
you'll achieve together!
